creator: man130117@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Tatsuki Makino from comment #2)
Thanks very much!

I solved the problem by reinstalling autoconf (and dependants). "autoconf2.13" and "autoconf213" folders are still present in /usr/ports/devel but none is installed; there is no "autoconf-wrapper" folder. All I have installed now (regarding autoconf) is:
- autoconf-2.69_4,
- autoconf-switch-20220527.
